headline: ‘Strangers Won't Share A Home’: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky Draws An Unexpected Parallel To Tokenization
summary: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky argued that fractional ownership, instant settlement, and global access could make investing in real-world assets far more accessible.

headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves a Second Chance and 2 We Avoid
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on Airbnb, Raises Price Target to $175
summary: Jefferies  analyst John Colantuoni   maintains Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $160 to $175.

headline: The Global Race For AI Dominance: How It's Reshaping Markets
